description_long: This object is a bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and a mounted telescopic scope, reminiscent of classic military sniper rifles. The stock is made of a light brown wood, extending from the butt to the fore-end, with a black rubber or metal buttplate. The barrel is long and slender, finished in matte black metal, and features iron sights in addition to the scope. A small, metallic clip of ammunition is shown floating nearby, indicating the rifle uses an internal magazine loaded by stripper clips. The scope is mounted above the receiver, with adjustment knobs visible, and the trigger guard and bolt handle are also clearly defined. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for precision shooting in urban or rural environments.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, black metal barrel, and a mounted telescopic scope. Includes a visible ammunition clip for internal magazine loading.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock, mounted scope, and a floating ammunition clip.
description_view_1: Angled view from the front left, highlighting the barrel, scope alignment, and the position of the ammunition clip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, scope, and the metallic ammunition clip from the left.
description_view_3: Angled view from the rear right, focusing on the buttstock, scope, and the rear sight area.
